title: orchis coriophora subsp. apricorum
intro: Orchis coriophora subsp. apricorum is a sub-species of the Bee Orchid, a type of flowering plant belonging to the Orchidaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Orchis coriophora subsp. apricorum include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural expectorant. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
